title: Mediterranean Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with lentils, vegetables, and a hint of Mediterranean spices. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and zucchini and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the lentils, vegetable broth, and Mediterranean seasoning. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Stir in the fermented olives and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
